metadata.title: Loverboy (Extended Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:12.30] I don't know what you've got
[01:16.55] But it plays with my emotions
[01:17.74] I want you so much
[01:20.95] Darling, I want to hold you near
[01:25.57] Want to whisper sweet and tender in your ear
[01:29.37] Can't stand the thought of you with somebody else
[01:33.84] Got to have your love, got to have it all to myself
[01:38.67] I say yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
[01:44.17] I wanna be your lover, lover, hmm
[01:47.78] Wanna be your lover, lover, loverboy
[01:55.33] Lover, lover, yeah
[01:58.43] Wanna be your lover, lover, loverboy
[02:05.17] 
[02:12.38] I'm too far gone, it's hard to stop
[02:16.76] Baby, you're my dream in motion
[02:19.02] And I won't give up
[02:21.57] Teasing me with your fire
[02:24.52] My finger's on the trigger, you're the one I desire
[02:29.66] 'Cause I get this feeling, feeling from nobody else
[02:34.10] Gotta have your tenderness all to myself
[02:38.87] I say yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
[02:45.33] Wanna be your lover, lover, hmm
[02:49.76] Wanna be your lover, lover, loverboy
[02:55.56] Lover, lover, yeah
[02:58.61] Wanna be your lover, lover, oh, oh, yeah
[03:07.33] 
[03:41.09] And I want you really
[03:42.63] But the thing is there's nothing I can say
[03:45.52] To stop you, darling, from running, running away
[03:50.27] Won't you stay, stay, stay?
[03:56.22] I wanna be your lover, lover, yeah
[04:00.73] I wanna be your lover, lover
[04:06.24] I wanna be your love
[04:12.63] I gotta be your love
[04:16.30] I wanna be your love
[07:06.49] And I can't stand it baby, uh
[07:10.19] Uh, uh, uh, uh, uh
[07:16.66] Girl, I love you
[07:19.80] 
[07:24.56] Uh, and I wanna be your lover
[08:08.13]
